NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO PETITIONERS PETITION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING PRESERVATION OF EVIDENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 64629911) FILED BY PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC.'S PETITION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING PRESERVATION OF EVIDENCE IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR IN ROOM 301 AT 9:00 A.M. ON JANUARY 24, 2020. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC.'S PETITION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING PRESERVATION OF EVIDENCE: PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE IS GRANTED. BRICK + TIMBER IS ORDERED TO WITHIN THE NEXT FIFTEEN (15) DAYS ALLOW PETITIONER TO REVIEW BRICK + TMBER'S SURVEILLANCE TAPE FOR JULY 8, 2019 FOR 720 JONES APARTMENTS AND TO MAKE A COPY OF ANY PORTION THAT RECOLOGY BELIEVES IS RELEVANT TO THE INCIDENT WHICH OCCURRED ON THAT DATE. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Recology, Inc.'S Petition For Order Authorizing Preservation Of Evidence
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Homaira Khalji, esq. (650-989-5420) for Petitioner.

Not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Recology, Inc.'S Petition For Order Authorizing Preservation Of Evidence:

PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE IS GRANTED. BRICK + TIMBER IS ORDERED TO WITHIN THE NEXT FIFTEEN (15) DAYS ALLOW PETITIONER TO REVIEW BRICK + TMBER'S SURVEILLANCE TAPE FOR JULY 8, 2019 FOR 720 JONES APARTMENTS AND TO MAKE A COPY OF ANY PORTION THAT RECOLOGY BELIEVES IS RELEVANT TO THE INCIDENT WHICH OCCURRED ON THAT DATE.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION - Notice Of Petition For Order Authorizing Preservation Of Evidence
Off Calendar Jan-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC.'s Petition For Order Authorizing Preservation Of Evidence is transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar in room 301 at 9:00 a.m. on January 24, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
